success: 🖋 Done. **{oldName}** has had their name quietly corrected to **{newName}** in the ledger.
🖋 Scratched out **{oldName}**, wrote in **{newName}**. The ink is barely dry.
🖋 **{oldName}** is now **{newName}**. I've updated the record — try not to change it again.
🖋 One careful strikethrough and a fresh inscription. **{newName}** it is.
🖋 The ledger has been amended. **{oldName}** is **{newName}** henceforth. Filed.
🖋 Name corrected. Honestly, you'd think adventurers could make up their minds. **{newName}** is official.
🖋 Consider **{oldName}** erased. **{newName}** now occupies that line — try to stick with it.
noChar: 🖋 Can't rename what's not recorded. No character found.
🖋 No entry found to rename. Are you sure they're in the ledger?
🖋 The quill searches but finds no such character. Nothing to rename.
🖋 I flipped every page — no character to rename. Perhaps a ghost?
conflict: 🖋 **{newName}** is already in the ledger. Pick a name that isn't taken.
🖋 There's already a **{newName}** on record. The ledger doesn't do duplicates.
🖋 **{newName}**? That name belongs to someone else already. Try another.
🖋 I won't write the same name twice. **{newName}** already has a page.
invalidName: 🖋 That name is illegible. Letters, numbers, spaces, apostrophes, and hyphens only.
🖋 I can't write that. Stick to letters, numbers, apostrophes, spaces, and hyphens.
🖋 The quill refuses. Invalid characters in that name — keep it legible.
🖋 Names in this ledger follow certain standards. That one does not meet them.
sameName: 🖋 That's already their name. Nothing to change here.
🖋 The new name is the same as the old one. I'll save the ink.
🖋 You've asked me to rename them to the same name. I haven't, on principle.
🖋 No changes made — that name is already recorded.
noPermission: 🖋 Only moderators or staff can rename another player's character.
🖋 Misfiled. You don't have authority to rename someone else's record.
🖋 The ledger restricts that action to staff. Nice try.
